message:
feat(search): Add HNSW-based approximate nearest neighbor index

Introduces O(log n) approximate vector search using the HNSW algorithm
from hnsw_rs crate, complementing the existing O(n) exact CVVI search.

New module src/search/ann_index.rs provides:
- HnswIndex struct wrapping hnsw_rs with DistDot similarity
- Build-time parameters: M=16, ef_construction=200 for quality/speed balance
- Query-time configurable ef_search (default 100) for recall tuning
- Serialization format with magic bytes (CHSW) and version header
- Integration with existing VectorIndex row indices

Trade-offs documented:
- ~95-99% recall depending on ef parameter
- ~50-100 bytes additional memory per vector for graph
- 2-5x slower build time vs CVVI-only

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
